introSection: Big Thunder Mountain is a steel roller coaster located at Disneyland Park in Marne la Vallée, Île-de-France, France.

sections.title: History
sections.content: Big Thunder Mountain closed in November 2015 for a renovation. It reopened in December 2016 with new special effects.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: Big thunder Mountain features two underwater tunnels at the start and end of the layout, in order to get on and off the island where most of the ride is located. This version of the attraction is the only Big Thunder Mountain to do that.

sections.title: Colour scheme
sections.content: Brown track. The ride's supports are hidden in the mountain structure.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: The trains received modifications by Reverchon in 2021. These changes made it possible for cast members to remove side panels for easier disability access.

sections.title: Incident
sections.content: Five riders were injured in 2011 when part of the attraction's thematic props fell onto a train.

fullText:
Big Thunder Mountain is a steel roller coaster located at Disneyland Park in Marne la Vallée, Île-de-France, France.

Big Thunder Mountain closed in November 2015 for a renovation. It reopened in December 2016 with new special effects.

Big thunder Mountain features two underwater tunnels at the start and end of the layout, in order to get on and off the island where most of the ride is located. This version of the attraction is the only Big Thunder Mountain to do that.

Brown track. The ride's supports are hidden in the mountain structure.

The trains received modifications by Reverchon in 2021. These changes made it possible for cast members to remove side panels for easier disability access.

Five riders were injured in 2011 when part of the attraction's thematic props fell onto a train.
